description: Black heels from catwalk. Created for the understated fashionista. Pair these shoes with bright colours in your ensemble.Heels: 2.5"UpperSynthetic leather strap for the forefootSynthetic leather footbed and heel cupElasticated loop from the heel cup to the midfoot for a snug FitCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and heel for added comfortshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
